member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.Coaching.CoachingWorker
member.summary: Pure-compute worker that analyzes an agent's communication patterns to produce actionable coaching recommendations for close rate improvement. Calls IAnthropicClient only — NO storage, NO DataServices. Skipped entirely if fewer than 5 sent + 5 inbox emails are available.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.Coaching.CoachingWorker.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IAnthropicClient,RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IContentSanitizer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.Workers.Activation.Coaching.CoachingWorker})
member.summary: Pure-compute worker that analyzes an agent's communication patterns to produce actionable coaching recommendations for close rate improvement. Calls IAnthropicClient only — NO storage, NO DataServices. Skipped entirely if fewer than 5 sent + 5 inbox emails are available.
